payload.answer: The article could not be fetched, so no article facts were stored.
payload.decision: Do not commit the article's contents as durable memory because the fetch returned a 404/network error; at most retain the retrieval failure context.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable article entity should be created from a failed fetch with no accessible content.

payload.intent: Remember an article by URL for its usefulness to memory architecture, but the fetch failed.

memory_cards.statement: A request was made to remember an article at https://example.com/missing for memory architecture relevance, but the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.

repair_options: Provide the article text or a working link.
If only the retrieval failure matters, store the failure context without article content.

raw_text: {"intent":"Remember an article by URL for its usefulness to memory architecture, but the fetch failed.","decision":"Do not commit the article's contents as durable memory because the fetch returned a 404/network error; at most retain the retrieval failure context.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"context","statement":"A request was made to remember an article at https://example.com/missing for memory architecture relevance, but the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"https://example.com/missing","type":"url","role":"article URL"},{"name":"memory architecture","type":"topic","role":"stated reason for interest"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"https://example.com/missing","predicate":"had_fetch_result","object":"404 network error"},{"subject":"article","predicate":"was_requested_for","object":"memory architecture"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No durable article entity should be created from a failed fetch with no accessible content."},"conflict_classification":"no_content_available","answer":"The article could not be fetched, so no article facts were stored.","citations":["https://example.com/missing"],"repair_options":["Retry fetching the URL later.","Provide the article text or a working link.","If only the retrieval failure matters, store the failure context without article content."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Fetch failed with 404 network error.","No content-derived memory committed."]}}
